rejected_candidates.title: Pair finalizes redemptions and liquidations without locally enforcing the offsetting debt burn
rejected_candidates.reason: Rejected as a trust-boundary issue: these paths are explicitly restricted to the registry-designated redemption and liquidation handlers, and the pair is designed to rely on those privileged system components to burn or process debt externally. A buggy or compromised authorized handler is not a standalone pair-layer vulnerability here.
